name: pygobuildinfo

metadata.name: pygobuildinfo
metadata.summary: A utility to extract go build info information fro go executables and shared libraries

modules.name: pygobuildinfo._pyinstaller
documentation: This package provides a hook for PyInstaller
needed to successfully freeze
the :doc:`pyi_hooksample package <../__init__.py>`.
It also provides tests for that hook.

functions.name: pygobuildinfo._pyinstaller.get_hook_dirs
documentation: Functions
.. _get_hook_dirs:
get_hook_dirs
Tell PyInstaller where to find hooks provided by this distribution;
this is referenced by the :ref:`hook registration <hook_registration>`.
This function returns a list containing only the path to this
directory, which is the location of these hooks.

functions.name: pygobuildinfo._pyinstaller.get_PyInstaller_tests
documentation: .. _get_PyInstaller_tests:
get_PyInstaller_tests
Tell PyInstaller where to find tests of the hooks provided by this
distribution; this is referenced by the :ref:`tests registration
<tests_registration>`. This function returns a list containing only
the path to this directory, which is the location of these tests.

functions.name: pygobuildinfo.get_go_build_info
documentation:
Check (in parallel) digital signature of all files in root_dir.
We assume there's a sha1sum.txt file under root_dir

functions.name: pygobuildinfo.get_go_mod
documentation:
Check (in parallel) digital signature of all files in root_dir.
We assume there's a sha1sum.txt file under root_dir
